name: v2025.10.14-beta
body:
# Changes
This release fixes LED behavior for adapters with external setup status LEDs and fixes build-time table size definitions that prevented larger route and child table size config from being applied.

## What's Changed
* Remove unnecessary build flags redefinition by @puddly in https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/128
* Stop LED blink timer on network formation by @puddly in https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/129
* Bump stable patch number to 3 by @puddly in https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/136


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/compare/v2025.09.17...v2025.09.30

name: v2025.09.17
body:
# Changes
This is a patch release incorporating a few small fixes:
1. The routing table size has been increased. This will help increase communication speed in certain network layouts when you control many devices at once.
2. Disable firmware group messages filtering. This allows the adapter to receive commands from arbitrary groups. Group commands with arbitrary group IDs are used by some scene controllers to distinguish button presses.

A new XNCP command has been added to identify the exact chip in use, to allow tailoring adapter settings at driver startup.

## What's Changed
* Bump the EmberZNet patch number to 7.4.4.1 by @puddly in https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/108
* Remove group packet filtering by replacing `sli_zigbee_am_multicast_member` by @puddly in https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/112
* Backport fixes from stable into dev by @puddly in https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/113
* Fix C flag definitions for some EZSP config options by @puddly in https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/117
* Increase routing table size by @puddly in https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/115
* Merge `main` into `stable` by @puddly in https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/123


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/compare/v2025.04.04...v2025.09.17

name: v2025.04.04-1
body:
# Changes

This is a patch release of EmberZNet 7.4.4.1 that removes a modification present in 7.4.4.0. Originally intended to improve group command handling, it was negatively affecting some types of IKEA remotes.

Please see the changelog for the previous release for more information: https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/releases/tag/v2025.04.04

---

# For developers

## What's Changed
* Bump the EmberZNet patch number to 7.4.4.1 by @puddly in https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/108


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/compare/v2025.04.04...v2025.04.04-1

name: v2025.04.04 (Gecko SDK v4.4.4)
body:
# Changes

This is a patch release of EmberZNet 7.4.4.1 that removes a modification present in 7.4.4.0. Originally intended to improve group command handling, it was negatively affecting some types of IKEA remotes.

---

# For developers
The changelog for the release is provided below.

## What's Changed
* Update build workflow actions. by @Nerivec in https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/87
* Improve subprocess run logging by @Nerivec in https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/88
* Release manifests by @puddly in https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/91
* Add an Apache 2.0 license by @puddly in https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/98
* Fix link to skyconnect_zigbee_ncp.yaml by @miklosbagi in https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/101
* Gecko SDK 4.4.6 by @puddly in https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/89
* Allow overriding the EZSP version patch number by @puddly in https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/102
* Generate changelogs for the manifest by @puddly in https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/104
* Replace `special` instead of `patch` when overriding version by @puddly in https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/106
* Disable "member of all groups" feature by @puddly in https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/103
* Revert "Gecko SDK 4.4.6 (#89)" for stable by @puddly in https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/107

## New Contributors
* @Nerivec made their first contribution in https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/87
* @miklosbagi made their first contribution in https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/101

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/compare/v2024.10.21...v2025.04.04

name: Build 2024.10.21 (Gecko SDK v4.4.4)
body:
# Information

This firmware release is built with the Silicon Labs Gecko SDK v4.4.4. There are no major changes or bugfixes in this release. New functionality includes the ability to rewrite the IEEE address of your Zigbee stick (allowing you to migrate the network multiple times).

---

## For developers
This release rewrites the firmware builder and moves all chip-specific customization directly into the YAML manifests, in addition to renaming the firmware types. This is a breaking change for all firmware types. Please see the changes to [the ZBT-1 manifest](https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/82/files#diff-223023eb892776526a20ebf517a471997dfa0424ff1c817f371b8674afd3dc87) for an example of how to migrate.

This release also introduces preliminary support for our XNCP custom commands. This is a work-in-progress and Zigbee software support will arrive over time. Do not rely on this command set to be stable, it will change in a future release.

## What's Changed
* Template projects by @puddly in https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/82
* Custom XNCP protocol commands by @puddly in https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/57
* Add zap tooling to Docker container by @tl-sl in https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/84

## New Contributors
* @tl-sl made their first contribution in https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/84

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/compare/v2024.8.20...v2024.10.21

name: Build 2024.8.5 (Gecko SDK v4.4.2)
body:
# Information
This is a Zigbee "config tweaking" build based again on Gecko SDK v4.4.2. It improves Zigbee group command performance by increasing the broadcast and unicast table sizes in addition to increasing the source route table size (if you use source routing).

All other firmwares are unchanged compared to the previous release.

## What's Changed
* Increase the source route table size to 200 by @puddly in https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/66
* Fix EFR32MG24 build by purging more chip-specific config files by @puddly in https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/67
* Enable file prefix map for Makefiles for reproducible builds by @puddly in https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/68
* Tooling cleanup and manifest reorganization by @puddly in https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/70
* Treat build-time warnings as errors by @puddly in https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/72
* Increase broadcast and unicast table sizes by @puddly in https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/71


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/compare/v4.4.2...v2024.8.5

name: Gecko SDK v4.4.2
body:
## Information

This is the first release utilizing our new firmware builder tool. Firmwares are built from Gecko SDK 4.4.2.

Please take a look at the [new firmware manifest format](https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/tree/main/manifests) if you are using this repository to build firmwares for other adapters, as it will greatly simplify things.


## What's Changed
* In-tree projects by @puddly in https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/41
* Fix Git repo permissions during CI by @puddly in https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/52
* Bump all CI action versions to remove deprecation warnings by @puddly in https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/53
* Allow PRs to build images by @puddly in https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/54
* Gecko SDK 4.4.2 by @puddly in https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/56
* Include firmware and stack versions in filenames by @puddly in https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/55
* Normalize `.cproject` files with pre-commit by @puddly in https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/60
* Update documentation to reflect current firmware builder by @puddly in https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/59
* Import `typing` to `tools/build_project.py` to fix CI by @puddly in https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/61
* Fix location of project build scripts within Eclipse project config by @puddly in https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/58
* Upload artifacts on release by @puddly in https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/62
* Revert "Upload artifacts on release (#62)" by @puddly in https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/63
* Upload artifacts on release by @puddly in https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/64
* Set default OpenThread TX power to 6dBm by @puddly in https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/pull/65


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/NabuCasa/silabs-firmware-builder/compare/v4.4.0...v4.4.2
